S2.s2t5_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ bad4269. Scope corrected from plan: L1 (postprocess_tool_output hard_limit) + L2 (existing BlobStore per-result spill at 4KB threshold with [blob:sha256:<hash>] refs) already existed. Only L3 aggregate was the real gap. Implementation: new crates/grid-engine/src/agent/turn_budget.rs pure helper enforce_turn_aggregate_budget() вЂ” idempotent L2-aware filter via BlobStore::parse_blob_ref, deterministic size-desc + index-asc tie-break, char-count accounting matching soft_trim_tool_result. Wired at harness.rs L2287 under config.blob_store guard; TOOL_RESULT_TURN_BUDGET=200_000 chars. 3 unit tests in tests/tool_result_aggregate_spill.rs: under_budget_noop + over_budget_spills_largest_first + tie_break_deterministic (5x loop byte-identical). D60 closure: scripts/verify-v2-mvp.py assertion 11 upgraded from non-fatal print to raise AssertionError. Commit surgical вЂ” reset 170+ pre-existing cargo fmt drift files, kept only 5-file S2.T5 diff. cargo check -p grid-engine clean (incremental 12s); 3/3 PASS. Reviewer APPROVE 0 Criticals 0 Majors. Plan's proposed tool_result_storage.rs NOT created (would duplicate BlobStore). Plan's OctoRoot reference stale (crates renamed to grid-*); no new GridRoot helper needed вЂ” executor.rs already constructs BlobStore at L430.
S2.note: S2.T4 landed 2026-04-15 @ bd7545d: test-only commit, 11 new tests in tests/test_s2t4_state_machine.py (406 lines). Gap-closing scope вЂ” all 11 are new coverage, zero duplication with test_files/test_review_fixes/test_s2t3. Scout blueprint at /tmp/s2t4-blueprint.md, reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals 0 Majors + 1 cosmetic nit applied inline. Key coverage: (1) forward via write() direct (not just confirm/archive helpers) for both suggestedв†’confirmed and confirmedв†’archived; (2) version monotonicity + created_at stable + updated_at non-decreasing + evidence_refs preserved across full state walk; (3) archived reversal via write() blocked (parametrized over agent_suggested/confirmed вЂ” archivedв†’archived intentionally dropped because same-status rewrites are allowed, per test_write_same_status_is_allowed); (4) list(status=...) filter returns exactly matching latest versions; (5) REST 409 invalid_transition + 404 not_found body shape parity (uses resp.json()['detail']['code'] вЂ” FastAPI nests HTTPException(detail=dict) under 'detail', blueprint erratum в†’ D101); (6) MCP dispatcher walk with read-path DB cross-check on embedding columns. Discovered production surface asymmetry в†’ D100: write()/confirm()/archive() construct MemoryFileOut inline and omit embedding_model_id+embedding_dim; only read_latest() в†’ _row_to_memory surfaces them. Test #10 navigates this via docstring + limited assertion. 114/114 PASS, ruff clean. Non-goals: no src/ changes, no concurrent writes (D12), no HNSW assertions. Orchestrator found 3 test bugs during verification and fixed inline: (1) zip(strict=True) with length-mismatch after [1:] slice, (2) archivedв†’archived blocking assertion contradicts same-status no-op rule, (3) cross-step embedding equality impossible due to write-path asymmetry.
